bill-boughton.name: Bill Boughton
bill-boughton.bio: Born William Ford Boughton in Glendale, Ohio on April 27, 1962, to Joe Boughton and Emily Richardson Boughton.  Grew up in Meadville, PA and attended Meadville Area Senior High School, graduating in 1980.  Attended Ohio Wesleyan University in Delaware, OH from 1980-82 and transferred to Pennsylvania State University (1982-84), graduating in 1984 with a BS degree in Quantitative Business Analysis.  During college, Bill taught tennis at the Ojibway Club from 1981 to 1983.  Married Julia Courts in 1991 at the Glendale Lyceum in Glendale, Ohio.  This is the same venue where Bill’s parents were married in 1956 and Bill’s maternal grandparents, Roland and Althea Richardson, in 1920.  Began working in 1984, first with Procter and Gamble and then with General Mills.  Attended graduate school at Xavier University in Cincinnati, OH, graduating with a master’s degree in education and a Secondary Social Studies Certification in teaching in 1994.  Taught at Delhi Junior High / Delhi Middle School on the west side of Cincinnati in the 1990s and then in Caracas, Venezuela for seven years in the early 2000s.   Bill’s life-long passion is enjoying time with his extended family, especially at Treasure Island!  Bill has served as Chairman of TI Camp in the 1990s and again during the covid era of 2020 to 2024.  He also had two terms as TI Camp Secretary. Currently, he is the TI Camp Rental Coordinator (since 2013), and has long been involved with TI Camp Work Weekends in the spring and fall.

jill-courts.name: Jill Courts
jill-courts.bio: Born Julia  Marie Courts in Middletown, Ohio on March 23, 1965 to Gary and Darlene Courts.    Attended Lemon Monroe High School, graduating in 1983.    Attended Ohio State University, graduating in 1988 with a BS in Chemical Engineering.   Married William Boughton on June 1, 1991.    Began working in Cincinnati at Procter & Gamble in 1989 with a seven year stint in Caracas, Venezuela from 2000-2007.     Had two children - Jennifer (March, 1994) and Benjamin (May, 1997).   Retired from P&G in 2012 and started her own business called Waste to Worth Innovations in 2013.

facts.label: Graduated from College; BS Chemical Engineering
